title: rosa viscaria var. bouvieri
intro: Rosa viscaria var. bouvieri, also known as the alpenrose, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The alpenrose plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. bouvieri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
